name: Lusha API
what_it_does: Lusha API — B2B contact data enrichment API for finding professional email addresses and phone numbers, enriching lead profiles with company data, and verifying contact information.
use_cases: Agents enriching CRM leads with verified email addresses and direct phone numbers via Lusha's contact API
Outbound prospecting automation — agents finding contact info for target companies' decision-makers at scale
CRM hygiene — agents validating and updating stale contact information in existing databases
SDR workflow automation — agents pulling verified prospect data into sales sequences automatically
Account-level enrichment — agents fetching company technographic and firmographic data for ICP scoring
not_for: Consumer contact data — Lusha is B2B focused; personal contact data collection may violate GDPR
High-volume bulk enrichment without API plan — free tier credits are limited
Real-time enrichment during live user interactions — Lusha API latency is not sub-100ms
best_when: Your agent needs reliable B2B contact data (email + phone) for outbound sales with higher mobile phone coverage than competitors.
avoid_when: You need consumer contact data or very high volume (millions) enrichment — use ZoomInfo or PeopleDataLabs for scale.

auth.notes: API key from Lusha developer portal. Passed in api_key header. Account-level key — no scope granularity. Monthly credit limits apply.

pricing.paid_tiers: Pro: $29/user/month (480 credits/year); Scale: $51/user/month (custom credits); Enterprise: custom
pricing.notes: Credit-based pricing — each API call for contact data consumes credits. Annual plans cheaper than monthly. Team plans available for org-level usage.

performance.rate_limits: API: 10 req/s; bulk enrichment endpoint available for higher throughput

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API with adequate documentation. Credit exhaustion returns clear 402 error. Contact not found returns 404 with empty data. Rate limit errors include retry timing.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Contact lookups by LinkedIn URL or email are idempotent reads. Same lookup consumes a credit each time — agents should cache results to avoid repeated credit consumption.
known_agent_gotchas: Each API call consumes a credit even for not-found results — agents should de-duplicate before calling
Contact data is sourced from Lusha's network — not real-time; some data may be months old
LinkedIn URL is the most reliable lookup identifier — email-based lookups have lower hit rates
GDPR compliance requires lawful basis for contacting EU residents — Lusha provides data but agents are responsible for compliance
Bulk enrichment API has different endpoint and higher minimum credit requirements than single-contact API

security_score_components.security_notes: GDPR and CCPA compliant. EU data processing. TLS enforced. No SOC2 documentation. API key with no scope granularity. Agents must ensure lawful basis for B2B contact data use.
